option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# GitHub Actions Workflows
This directory contains CI/CD workflow configurations.
## Workflows: - Build and Test - Code Quality Analysis - Security Scanning - Deployment Pipelines

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Docker Configuration
This directory contains Docker files for containerizing the application.
## Contents: - Dockerfile for microservices - docker-compose.yml for local development - Docker build scripts

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Documentation
This directory contains all project documentation.
## Subdirectories: - **architecture/** - Architecture decisions and diagrams - **api/** - API specifications and documentation - **decisions/** - Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# API Documentation
This directory contains REST API specifications and documentation.
## Contents: - API endpoint documentation - Request/Response examples - Authentication and authorization - Rate limiting specifications

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Architecture
This directory contains architecture documentation and diagrams for the nextgen-banking-platform.
## Contents: - System architecture diagrams - Component design specifications - Technology stack documentation

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Architecture Decision Records (ADRs)
This directory contains Architecture Decision Records documenting important technical decisions.
## Format: Each decision is documented with: - Context: Why the decision was needed - Decision: What was decided - Consequences: Implications of the decision

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Kubernetes Configuration
This directory contains Kubernetes manifests for deployment.
## Contents: - Deployment configurations - Service definitions - ConfigMaps and Secrets - Ingress configuration - Persistent Volume claims

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Postman Collections
This directory contains Postman collections for API testing.
## Contents: - API endpoint collections - Environment variables - Pre-request scripts - Test scripts

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Scripts
This directory contains utility scripts for building, testing, and deployment.
## Scripts: - Build scripts - Deployment scripts - Database migration scripts - Testing utilities

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Services
This directory contains all microservices for the banking platform.
## Microservices: - Account Service - Transaction Service - Authentication Service - Notification Service - User Service
